subject: Complaint: MRI Claim Denied Without Warning
body: I am filing a formal complaint about the denial of my MRI claim (CLM-MB-003). My PCP referred me to an orthopedic specialist, who ordered the MRI for my right knee. At no point was I informed that a prior authorization was required. I received a bill for $1,950 with no warning. This is unacceptable. I have already called member services and filed an appeal, but I want this complaint on record. The process for communicating prior auth requirements to members needs to be improved.

subject: RE: Complaint: MRI Claim Denied Without Warning
body: Dear Marcus, thank you for reaching out. We understand your frustration and sincerely apologize for the lack of communication regarding the prior authorization requirement. Your complaint has been documented (CASE-MB-001). Your appeal is currently under review and we expect a decision within 30 days. We are also forwarding your feedback about prior auth communication to our quality improvement team. If you have further questions, please call Member Services at 1-800-555-0199. — Janet Rodriguez, Member Services
